case_title: CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. VS. DOROTHY NEDDO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160 EDDY ST. ROOM 203, SF ,CA, JUDGMENT UPON EX-PARTE DECLARATION PURSUANT TO NON COMPLIANCE OF STIPULATION MADE IN OPEN COURT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF POSSESSION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION SERVED JAN-08-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY
CONDITIONAL STIPULATION FOR DISMISSAL OR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEDDO, DOROTHY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.57 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER, INC. A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION
